query: As of July 2026, what is the financial/bankruptcy status of Beyond Meat Inc? Has it filed for Chapter 11 or restructured debt? Any bankruptcy warnings, going concern doubts, debt restructuring, or imminent bankruptcy risk in 2025-2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings on Beyond Meat's financial/bankruptcy status as of July 2026:

## Bottom Line
**Beyond Meat has NOT filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.** Bankruptcy rumors circulated in August 2025 (which the company denied) and analysts flagged Chapter 11 risk, but the company **avoided bankruptcy through an out-of-court debt restructuring in October 2025**—at the cost of massive shareholder dilution. It remains severely distressed but is not currently signaling an imminent bankruptcy filing.

## Key Findings

**Debt restructuring (the pivotal event):**
- October 2025: ~$1.11B (~96.9%) of 0% Convertible Notes due 2027 swapped into new 7.00% Convertible Senior Secured Second Lien PIK Toggle Notes due 2030 (~$202.5M) plus up to ~326.2M new shares.
- Aimed to eliminate >$800M of debt; pushed the maturity wall from 2027 to 2030.
- Stock crashed ~56% on Oct 13, 2025 due to dilution.
- Produced a ~$548.7M one-time non-cash gain (creating a *reported* Q4 2025 profit despite weak operations).

**Going concern / liquidity:**
- No explicit going-concern warning in Q1 2026 filings.
- Cash ~$205.8M; total debt ~$411.6M (as of March 28, 2026).
- BTIG estimated ~4–6 quarters of cash runway (into ~2027).
- Disclosed a material weakness in internal controls; delayed FY2025 10-K.

**Deteriorating operations:**
- FY2025 revenue ~$275.5M (down >15%, lowest since IPO).
- Q1 2026 revenue $58.2M (down 15.3%), net loss $28.5M.

**Nasdaq delisting risk (the more acute near-term threat):**
- Must close ≥$1 for 10 consecutive days by **August 31, 2026** or face delisting.
- Stock ~$0.745 on July 1, 2026 (~90% below 52-week high, >99% below all-time high).
- Reverse split authorized (Nov 2025) but not yet executed.

The near-term binary risk is **delisting/reverse split rather than a fresh bankruptcy filing**, though long-term solvency remains unresolved. Full structured findings with all data points and sources have been submitted.

key_facts: Beyond Meat has NOT filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy as of July 2026; it denied August 2025 filing rumors.

In October 2025 it completed an out-of-court debt restructuring: ~$1.11B (~96.9%) of 0% Convertible Notes due 2027 exchanged for new 7.00% Convertible Senior Secured Second Lien PIK Toggle Notes due 2030 plus common stock, aiming to eliminate over $800M of debt.
The debt swap issued up to ~326.2M new shares, causing catastrophic dilution; stock crashed ~56% on Oct 13, 2025.
The debt extinguishment produced a ~$548.7M one-time non-cash gain, driving a reported net profit in Q4 2025 despite operational deterioration.
Q1 2026 (ended March 28, 2026): revenue $58.2M (down 15.3% YoY), net loss $28.5M, gross margin 3.4%, cash & equivalents ~$205.8M, total debt ~$411.6M.
No explicit going-concern warning in the Q1 2026 release; BTIG estimated cash runway of four to six quarters.
Company disclosed a material weakness in internal controls and delayed its FY2025 10-K (filed April 12, 2026).
Nasdaq delisting deadline: must close >=$1 for 10 consecutive days by August 31, 2026; stock below $1 since ~Jan 15, 2026.
BYND traded ~$0.745 on July 1, 2026, market cap ~$384M, ~90% below 52-week high and >99% below all-time high.
FY2025 revenue ~$275.5M (down >15% YoY), lowest since IPO; a reverse stock split was authorized in Nov 2025 but not yet executed.
One analyst report cited negative shareholders' equity of approximately -$784.1M.
